name: Misestrone Casalinga
recipeIngredient: 2 large potatoes, peeled and cut into chunks
2 zucchini, halved lengthwise and thinly sliced
1 cup green beans, cut into 2-inch pieces
1/2 cup orzo, or other small pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans covered in water overnight.
2. Drain and rinse the beans.
3. In a large soup pot, combine the beans and water or broth with onion and garlic. Bring to a boil, then cover and cook over low heat for 1 hour.
4. Add leeks, carrots, celery, potatoes, mushrooms, zucchini, green beans, tomatoes, and seasonings. Continue cooking for another hour.
5. Add cabbage and peas, then cook an additional 20 minutes.
6. Add pasta and cook until tender, about 10 more minutes.
7. Sprinkle with freshly ground pepper before serving.
HINT: This soup is even better when reheated. It also freezes well. Vary the vegetables to suit your tastes or what you have available.
